title: unexpected error in case when
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1;
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS v0;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BLOB(33));
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 CHAR DEFAULT NULL , c1 DATETIME , c2 BIT(9) PRIMARY KEY );
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT NULL FROM t1;
INSERT IGNORE INTO t0 VALUES ('111');

SELECT TRUE
FROM t1, t0
    NATURAL RIGHT JOIN v0
WHERE (
    CASE TRUE
        WHEN NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE (CASE '' WHEN t1.c2 THEN NULL ELSE v0.c0 END) AND 11
    END
);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

see the following case:

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
// MySQL 8.4.1
mysql> SELECT TRUE
    -> FROM t1, t0
    ->     NATURAL RIGHT JOIN v0
    -> WHERE (
    ->     CASE TRUE
    ->         WHEN NULL THEN NULL
    ->         ELSE (CASE '' WHEN t1.c2 THEN NULL ELSE v0.c0 END) AND 11
    ->     END
    -> );
Empty set (0.01 sec)

// TiDB
mysql> SELECT TRUE
    -> FROM t1, t0
    ->     NATURAL RIGHT JOIN v0
    -> WHERE (
    ->     CASE TRUE
    ->         WHEN NULL THEN NULL
    ->         ELSE (CASE '' WHEN t1.c2 THEN NULL ELSE v0.c0 END) AND 11
    ->     END
    -> );
ERROR 1105 (HY000): interface conversion: expression.Expression is *expression.ScalarFunction, not *expression.Column
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

mysql> select version();
+--------------------+
| version()          |
+--------------------+
| 8.0.11-TiDB-v8.5.0 |
+--------------------+
1 row in set (0.04 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, c2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 'test', NULL), (2, NULL, '2023-01-01'), (3, 'example', '2023-01-02');
SELECT CASE WHEN c1 IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE c1 END AS result FROM t2 WHERE c0 = 1;
SELECT TRUE FROM t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NULL AS c0) AS subquery ON TRUE WHERE (CASE c0 WHEN 1 THEN NULL ELSE c1 END) IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CASE statement with NULL and NATURAL RIGHT JOIN
